allow: Bash(Rscript -e " library\(knitr\) # Look at internal hook-related functions cat\(deparse\(knitr:::output_chunk\), sep=''\\n''\) ")
Bash(Rscript -e " library\(knitr\) cat\(deparse\(knitr:::sew.knit_asis\), sep=''\\n''\) cat\(''\\n---\\n''\) cat\(deparse\(knitr:::sew\), sep=''\\n''\) ")
Bash(Rscript -e " library\(knitr\) # Look at how error hook output is collected/processed cat\(deparse\(knitr:::process_chunk\), sep=''\\n''\) ")
Bash(Rscript -e " library\(knitr\) # Look at wrap function which processes hook output cat\(deparse\(knitr:::wrap\), sep=''\\n''\) ")
